Definition: the center part of something
Example-English 1: The teacher stood in the middle of the classroom so everyone could see her.
Example-Chinnese 1: 老師站在教室中央，這樣大家都能看到她。
Example-English 2: There is a beautiful fountain in the middle of the park.
Example-Chinnese 2: 公園中央有一個美麗的噴泉。
Example-English 3: Do not stop in the middle of the road.
Example-Chinnese 3: 不要停在繁忙道路的中央。

Definition: all the cars moving on a road
Example-English 1: We were late for the movie because we got stuck in heavy traffic on the highway.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我們看電影遲到了，因為我們被困在高速公路上的繁忙交通中。
Example-English 2: There is always heavy traffic in the city center during rush hour.
Example-Chinnese 2: 尖峰時段市中心總是有繁忙的交通。
Example-English 3: There is heavy traffic on this road today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 今天這條路上有繁忙的車流。

Definition: the capital city of the UK
Example-English 1: My dream is to visit London and see the famous Big Ben clock tower.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我的夢想是參訪倫敦，看看著名的大笨鐘。
Example-English 2: They will take an airplane to visit London for their summer vacation.
Example-Chinnese 2: 他們將搭飛機去參訪倫敦度暑假。
Example-English 3: Many tourists visit London every summer.
Example-Chinnese 3: 許多遊客每年夏天參訪倫敦。

Definition: a big road where cars drive fast
Example-English 1: You can drive on the motorway to reach the next city much faster.
Example-Chinnese 1: 你可以開車在高速公路上，更快地到達下一個城市。
Example-English 2: It is dangerous to drive on the motorway if you are feeling very sleepy.
Example-Chinnese 2: 如果你覺得很睏，開車在高速公路上是很危險的。
Example-English 3: Sleepy drivers must not drive on the motorway today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 很睏的駕駛今天不可以在高速公路上開車。

Definition: a person who flies a plane
Example-English 1: The brave airplane pilot flew the jet safely through the terrible storm.
Example-Chinnese 1: 勇敢的飛機駕駛員安全地駕駛噴射機穿過可怕的風暴。
Example-English 2: My uncle is an airplane pilot who travels to different countries every week.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我叔叔是一名飛機駕駛員，每週都會去不同的國家旅行。
Example-English 3: I want to be an airplane pilot someday.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我有一天想成為飛機駕駛員。

Definition: a place where you wait for a train
Example-English 1: The passengers are waiting on the train platform for the express train to arrive.
Example-Chinnese 1: 乘客們正在火車月台上等待特快列車到達。
Example-English 2: Please stand behind the yellow line on the train platform for your safety.
Example-Chinnese 2: 為了您的安全，請站在火車月台上的黃線後面。
Example-English 3: We waited on the train platform this morning.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我們今天早上在火車月台等候。

Definition: to not leave a place
Example-English 1: If you are sick with a fever, you should stay at home and rest in bed.
Example-Chinnese 1: 如果你發燒生病了，你應該待在家裡並在床上休息。
Example-English 2: It is raining heavily outside, so let's stay at home and watch a movie.
Example-Chinnese 2: 外面雨下得很大，所以我們待在家裡看電影吧。
Example-English 3: My dog likes to stay at home every day.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我的狗喜歡每天待在家裡。

Definition: a large bird that flies very high
Example-English 1: The bald eagle flew high in the sky, looking for fish in the river below.
Example-Chinnese 1: 禿鷹在天空中高飛，尋找下方河裡的魚。
Example-English 2: We saw a majestic bald eagle resting on the top branch of the tall tree.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們看到一隻雄偉的禿鷹停在高樹的頂端樹枝上。
Example-English 3: The bald eagle is a famous American bird.
Example-Chinnese 3: 禿鷹是美國著名的鳥。

Definition: to learn or discover something
Example-English 1: The clever detective asked many questions to find out the truth about the stolen diamond.
Example-Chinnese 1: 聰明的偵探問了許多問題，以找出關於被盜鑽石的真相。
Example-English 2: We need to check the security cameras to find out the truth of the accident.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們需要查看監視器，以找出事故的真相。
Example-English 3: We need to find out the truth today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我們今天需要找出真相。

Definition: a big building where things are made
Example-English 1: Hundreds of workers make sneakers and boots in the large shoe factory every day.
Example-Chinnese 1: 數百名工人在這家大型鞋廠每天製造運動鞋和靴子。
Example-English 2: The noisy machines in the shoe factory run from morning until night.
Example-Chinnese 2: 鞋廠裡吵雜的機器從早運轉到晚。
Example-English 3: My father works at the local shoe factory.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我父親在當地鞋廠工作。

Definition: a room where people work at desks
Example-English 1: I need to go to the post office to buy stamps and mail this heavy package.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我需要去郵局買郵票並寄這個重包裹。
Example-English 2: The post office is closed on Sundays, so you cannot send letters today.
Example-Chinnese 2: 郵局星期天沒開，所以你今天不能寄信。
Example-English 3: The post office is near our school today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 郵局今天在我們學校附近。

Definition: a paper cover for a letter
Example-English 1: He used a sharp knife to open the envelope and read the secret letter inside.
Example-Chinnese 1: 他用一把鋒利的刀打開信封，閱讀裡面的秘密信件。
Example-English 2: Do not open the envelope until it is your birthday!
Example-Chinnese 2: 直到你的生日才能打開這個信封！
Example-English 3: I will open the envelope after lunch today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我今天午餐後會打開信封。

Definition: facts or details about something
Example-English 1: The internet is full of useful information for students doing their science homework.
Example-Chinnese 1: 網路上充滿了對做科學作業的學生有用的資訊。
Example-English 2: The tour guide gave us some useful information about the history of the old castle.
Example-Chinnese 2: 導遊給了我們一些關於這座古堡歷史的有用的資訊。
Example-English 3: This book has useful information about trains.
Example-Chinnese 3: 這本書有關火車的有用資訊。

Definition: having great value or meaning
Example-English 1: The pirate map shows the location of a very important treasure hidden on the island.
Example-Chinnese 1: 海盜地圖顯示了隱藏在島上一個非常重要的寶藏的位置。
Example-English 2: This old necklace is an important treasure to our family history.
Example-Chinnese 2: 這條舊項鍊對我們家族歷史來說是一個重要的寶藏。
Example-English 3: The museum keeps the important treasure inside.
Example-Chinnese 3: 博物館把這件重要寶物保存在裡面。

Definition: to go away from a place
Example-English 1: Please turn off the lights when you leave the room.
Example-Chinnese 1: 當你離開房間時，請關燈。
Example-English 2: The angry man decided to leave the room and slam the door behind him.
Example-Chinnese 2: 生氣的男人決定離開房間並用力關上門。
Example-English 3: The teacher asked him to leave the room.
Example-Chinnese 3: 老師請他離開房間。

Definition: a special day when people celebrate
Example-English 1: Thousands of people danced and sang at the outdoor music festival last weekend.
Example-Chinnese 1: 數千人在上週末的戶外音樂節上跳舞唱歌。
Example-English 2: We bought tickets to see our favorite bands play at the summer music festival.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們買了票去夏日音樂節看我們最喜歡的樂團表演。
Example-English 3: The music festival starts in the park today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 音樂節今天要在公園開始。

Definition: wanting to know more about something
Example-English 1: He is very interested in outer space and wants to be an astronaut.
Example-Chinnese 1: 他對外太空非常感興趣，並想成為一名太空人。
Example-English 2: My sister is interested in learning how to play the guitar.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我妹妹對學習彈吉他感興趣。
Example-English 3: I am interested in the school basketball team.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我對學校籃球隊有興趣。

Definition: keeping your attention because it is cool
Example-English 1: The grandfather told an interesting story about a brave knight and a dragon.
Example-Chinnese 1: 祖父講了一個關於勇敢騎士和龍的有趣故事。
Example-English 2: I read an interesting story in the comic book yesterday.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我昨天在漫畫書裡讀到一個有趣的故事。
Example-English 3: My brother told an interesting story last night.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我哥哥昨晚講了一個有趣的故事。

Definition: something you win in a game
Example-English 1: If you run the fastest in the race, you will win a prize.
Example-Chinnese 1: 如果你在比賽中跑得最快，你將贏得一個獎品。
Example-English 2: She practiced spelling every day to win a prize in the spelling bee.
Example-Chinnese 2: 她每天練習拼字，為了在拼字比賽中贏得一個獎品。
Example-English 3: He wants to win a prize at school today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 他今天想在學校贏得獎品。

Definition: the part that comes first
Example-English 1: The teacher stands in front of the blackboard to teach the class.
Example-Chinnese 1: 老師站在黑板前面教課。
Example-English 2: Please park your car in front of the supermarket.
Example-Chinnese 2: 請把你的車停在超市前面。
Example-English 3: There is a garden in front of my house.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我家前面有一個美麗的花園。

Definition: a flat board on a wall to put things on
Example-English 1: I cannot reach the high book on the shelf without a ladder.
Example-Chinnese 1: 沒有梯子我拿不到書架上那本高處的書。
Example-English 2: Please put the dictionary back as a book on the shelf when you are done.
Example-Chinnese 2: 當你用完時，請把字典當作書架上的書放回去。
Example-English 3: The book on the shelf is very dusty now.
Example-Chinnese 3: 書架上那本書現在很佈滿灰塵。
